The Tracker App

Mac Menu Bar

Track calories, water, workouts, and macros right from your menu bar. No dock icon, no window clutter — just a lightweight companion that keeps logging fast.

AI Food Logging · Water Tracking · Workout Entry · 2,700+ Food Catalog · Macro View · Menu-Bar Badge

Download

Version 1.0.0 · macOS 13+

⬇ Download for Apple Silicon

M1 · M2 · M3 · M4 · ~400 KB

⬇ Download for Intel

~400 KB

Not sure? Apple menu → About This Mac → look for Chip or Processor.

After downloading, extract the ZIP. Right-click TheTrackerApp.app and select Open.
Or use Terminal: xattr -d com.apple.quarantine ~/Downloads/TheTrackerApp.app
